【末世游戏降临+大佬回归+全息游戏+微第四天灾+无cp+都市异能+真假千金+弹幕】
　　全球第一款全息游戏横空出世，消息一出，全网沸腾。
　　起初，玩家都以为这不过是个普通的游戏，直到诡异肆虐，怪物横行，各种不可能存在于现实的奇幻种族现世，半兽人、精灵、恶魔、龙裔……人们才终于意识到——
　　游戏降临现实，末日来临。
　　————————
　　一开始游戏发售，叶峥嵘是不感兴趣的，预约也只是凑个热闹，直到眼前突然出现弹幕。
　　【女主终于重生了！接下来只要抢在叶峥嵘前面注册游戏账号，就能把假千金的金手指全截胡了，冲冲冲！】
　　叶峥嵘：？
　　假千金，谁？
　　【笑死，女主选的人族可是游戏未来战力天花板，恶毒女配一个区区龙族，到时候也只能给我们妹宝当坐骑！】
　　叶峥嵘：……？恶毒女配？谁，她吗？
　　先不提真不真假不假恶毒不恶毒，她一个内测回归老玩家，怎么不知道龙裔拉到只能当坐骑了？
————————
1.有其他内测玩家，但女主是绝对的最强。
2.真假千金是伏笔，后面女主会报复回去，不要急。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a72c8c4d447a59ad721cba8c585a2689","author":"兰卡尼玛","author_id":"","book_id":"7594447185765223448","book_name":"内测玩家强亿点怎么了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594447265708638744","read_count":"48605","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"352204"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"153","tags":"游戏体育,重生,末世,无CP,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/22548839110498ea2f8fca9ff0b76a7c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180026&x-signature=%2BH71t2V9oOjpruRfcxYkxSyJ%2FLw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2368818852141296","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"222"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016402649421D0C2E84453EB886"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9637,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24598,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2372},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_au
